schema_note: P2C-owned witness-freeze bundle, mirroring the exports/packets convention TaF and TI established (TAF-001, TI source-packet practice). This is NOT a source-issued packet from another repo; possibility-to-capability is the source and owner of the witness construction. Physics inside is cited at literature grade only.

source.content_revision_note: The git revision at which every blob's originating artifact (explorations/2026-07-16-real-physical-witness/{WITNESS-FREEZE,REFEREE-REPORT}.md, tests/physical_witness_discriminator.py) exists byte-identically in-tree. Blobs are byte-exact copies pinned by sha256 below; the freezing mechanism is the hash manifest, not the copy.
source.governing_document: blobs/REFEREE-REPORT.md (the referee report GOVERNS grades and corrections; read before citing)

construction_forks_retained: BCS microscopic (same fluxoid quantization from pairing)
topological/TQFT (winding as homotopy invariant of S^1 -> U(1))
thermodynamic / Landau two-phase reading (retained AND weaponized as the steelman rival)
source_theory_citations_literature_grade: Fluxoid quantization (F. London 1948; Deaver-Fairbank and Doll-Nabauer experiments, 1961)
Persistent supercurrent / phase-slip barrier (textbook: Tinkham; Annett)

signature_vector.Q: quantization - trapped value in Z*Phi_0, a global winding invariant (measurable: fluxoid staircase, D-Q)
signature_vector.I: local-operation invariance - winding n unchanged by DEFORM / gauge / local latent-state change (measurable: D-I)
signature_vector.P: persistence - n does not relax; macroscopic phase-slip barrier; graded 'effectively infinite (literature)', NOT 'provably infinite' (D-P; history leg capped, not killed)

frame_declaration.rule: Referee correction R-D1, applied and load-bearing. The capability claim is FRAME-INDEXED per Hierarchy v0.2 section 2.5 (the normalization frame is a parameter of the Capability type, not a derived fact).
frame_declaration.declared_frame: budget-matched counterfactual pair: ring in S versus a reference normal conductor of matched geometry at the same fixed final temperature T_f < Tc, after the same COOL and THREAD budget has been spent on both; PROBE_READ metrology budget identical across branches.
frame_declaration.explicitly_not_claimed: the literal single-system before/after (same ring at T > Tc versus T < Tc) is NOT budget-matched (two temperatures) and carries no frame-free matched-before/after claim.

candidate.boundary_event: cooling the ring N -> S through Tc while flux is present
candidate.candidate_capability_task: hold a quantized circulating memory indefinitely at zero maintenance cost, robust to local perturbation
candidate.candidate_statement: In the declared frame, the task above is realizable in the S branch (signatures Q, I, P) and not realizable in the N branch at any budget (maintenance cost I^2*R*t diverges; value continuous, non-invariant, decays in L/R).
candidate.steelman_rival: whole-family disclosure (N and S as two regions of one fixed phase diagram) backed by the seed reading of the stored value and the metastability reading of persistence, at matched resource.

executable_discriminator.verification: python blobs/physical_witness_discriminator.py; byte-compare stdout against blobs/discriminator_output.txt (deterministic; verified byte-identical at freeze time; exit 0)
executable_discriminator.evidential_headline: 7 [E] + 4 [F] = 11 evidential checks; 2 [T] theorem-consequence checks carrying no evidential weight; tef_check_tag_linter.py --strict clean

key_checks.k1: [E] nine LOCAL completion classes fail at least one of the (Q,I,P) signatures
key_checks.k2: [E] the whole-family-WITH-target-phase completion ABSORBS the candidate (intentional exhibition of the pre-declared kill vector; licenses no capability claim)
key_checks.k2-fail: [F] whole-family WITHOUT the target phase does NOT absorb it (the absorption is caused specifically by admitting the target phase)
key_checks.n1/n1-fail: [E]/[F] discriminator verdict is branch-label-invariant, with a demonstrated failing direction

frozen_disposition: SURVIVES_LOCAL_COMPLETIONS / UNDISCHARGED_VS_WHOLE_FAMILY, frame-indexed to the matched-budget counterfactual pair. No capability-enlargement verdict is licensed or directionally asserted.
open_question_routed: Whether admitting the target superconducting phase into the fixed completion family is a legitimate completion (the fixed-family absorber; P2C hierarchy falsifier F1). Not resolvable inside P2C.

interfaces.requested_datum: an invariant capability-change adjudication of the frozen witness under TaF's own standards (record/access machinery, D1 profile, task-achievability semantics): is the declared counterfactual pair a capability change, or does it factor through TaF's record/access/resource machinery? No desired verdict is included.

a whole-family completion attack on the same frozen witness under TI's CompletionClass machinery: is admitting the superconducting phase into the fixed completion family a legitimate whole_family completion? No source issuance is asserted and no desired verdict is included.

same_frozen_witness_rule: Per steward/research-portfolio.json handoffs.return_activation and P2C-CROSS-REPO-ADJUDICATION activation: sovereign returns may be combined ONLY if both sovereigns were tested on THIS bundle, unchanged, identified by the sha256 manifest above. Any modification produces a different witness and voids combination.
nonclaims: No claim that superconductivity 'is' finality, issuance, or a GU/TI/TaF object; no source claim moves; bar(b), H59, Krein positivity, physical issuance remain OPEN and untouched.
No claim the candidate is validated as capability enlargement; it is explicitly UNDISCHARGED against the whole-family completion.

The discriminator fixture is a finite instrument; its evidential checks validate instrument behavior under stipulated witnesses, not real superconductors. Real-experiment backing for D-Q/D-I is cited at literature grade, not re-run.
Persistence (P) is 'effectively infinite' at literature grade, not 'provably infinite' at finite ring size; the history/metastability leg is capped, not fully killed.
TaF and TI are sovereign: they may adopt, reject, adapt, or ignore the proposals; split or negative returns are first-class and will be preserved as such.
